evals.name: Product Feature Ideation
evals.prompt: Brainstorm innovative features for a productivity mobile app to help users manage their daily tasks more effectively. The app already has basic task tracking and calendar integration. What new capabilities could differentiate it from competitors?

evals.name: Technical Problem Solving
evals.prompt: We're experiencing high API latency in our microservices architecture during peak hours. This causes poor user experience. Help me brainstorm potential root causes and solutions to improve response times.

evals.name: Business Strategy Development
evals.prompt: Our SaaS company needs to expand into new markets. We currently serve B2B enterprise clients in North America. What strategic directions should we explore to grow revenue while managing risk?

evals.name: UX Improvement Ideation
evals.prompt: Our onboarding flow has a 40% dropout rate. Users report frustration during account setup and initial configuration. Brainstorm ways to improve this experience and reduce drop-off.

evals.name: Innovation Challenge
evals.prompt: What creative ways could we use AI and machine learning in an e-commerce platform to create competitive advantages? Focus on both customer-facing and operational improvements.

evals.name: Marketing Campaign Ideas
evals.prompt: We're launching a new developer tool and need fresh marketing campaign ideas. Our target audience is experienced software engineers. How can we stand out and get adoption?

evals.name: Educational Content Strategy
evals.prompt: Brainstorm innovative ways to teach complex programming concepts to beginners. What methods, formats, or approaches could make learning more engaging and effective?

evals.name: Sustainability Initiative
evals.prompt: Our company wants to reduce its carbon footprint. We operate data centers, offices globally, and have thousands of remote employees. What are innovative approaches we could take?

evals.name: Product Pivot Exploration
evals.prompt: We're considering pivoting our analytics platform. Current customers use us for web analytics but we see demand in the mobile analytics space. What new features and capabilities should we explore?

evals.name: Creative Problem Solving
evals.prompt: We need creative ideas for team-building activities and company culture initiatives. We're a distributed team across 5 time zones with 150 employees. What should we try?
